positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a friendly, whimsical fox curled up within a crescent moon, surrounded by delicate line-art elements of blooming lavender and stars. The scene should have a strong, contrasting silhouette against a clean, negative space background. Style: Nordic folk art meets sophisticated linocut print. Color direction: Limited palette of deep midnight blue, creamy beige, and muted gold accents. Composition: Central focus with high contrast, perfect for a repeatable apparel motif. Ideal for screen printing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, amateur, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, messy lines, complicated background details
